name: S3 Ransomware via Batch Object Deletion
description: Simulates a ransomware attack that deletes S3 objects in large batches using s3:DeleteObjects, which creates fewer CloudTrail events per object than individual deletion — a common evasion technique.
detection_signal: s3:DeleteObjects with a large number of objects in a single call, especially without concurrent PUT operations — indicates mass destruction rather than normal churn
